security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' wss://relay.hades.im https://relay.hades.im; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: https://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; media-src 'self' blob:

bundle.shortDescription: Private encrypted messaging with zero metadata leakage
bundle.longDescription: True end-to-end encrypted messaging with post-quantum security, forced Tor routing, and a built-in multi-chain crypto wallet — all governed by a single seed phrase.
